findings.description: The source recommends referring to `nablarch.sample.ss99ZZ.B99ZZ011Action` in the Nablarch Sample Project when the implementation method is unclear. This concrete class reference is absent from the knowledge file.
findings.source_evidence:
実装方法が不明な場合は、Nablarch Sample Projectの以下クラスを参照してください。
* nablarch.sample.ss99ZZ.B99ZZ011Action
